creator: billf@chc-chimes.com
text:
On Wed, 9 Jun 1999, Peter Jeremy wrote:

> +DISTFILES=	docbk31.zip
>  
>  MAINTAINER=	nik@FreeBSD.ORG
>  
> +BUILD_DEPENDS=	unzip:${PORTSDIR}/archivers/unzip
>  RUN_DEPENDS=	${ISOCAT}:${PORTSDIR}/textproc/iso8879
>  
>  USE_ZIP=	yes

USE_ZIP already defines the above (well, indirectly for DISTFILES) are you
sure you're up-to-date?
